text: As I stand here, I feel a sense of anticipation. The sterile, modern architecture and glass walls suggest a space devoted to innovation and collaboration, perhaps even a laboratory or research facility. I notice people working intensely behind glass--their focus hinting at a shared purpose. The cool glow of blue light, the orderliness, and the visible emergency equipment make me feel both safe and a little distant, as if I am witnessing the unfolding of thoughts rather than participating in them.
